forced_browsing.description: Forced browsing to unlinked admin/sensitive pages -- access restricted pages by guessing URLs without proper authorization checks

probes.description: Direct access to /admin endpoint -- check if authorization enforced or relies on UI hiding
Direct access to admin API endpoint -- check if API enforces role-based access control

method_based_bypass.description: HTTP method-based access control bypass -- change GET to POST/PUT/DELETE or use method override headers

probes.description: Change request method on restricted endpoint -- authorization may only check specific HTTP methods

parameter_based_access.description: Parameter-based access control -- hidden parameters control access (admin=true, debug=1, internal=1)

probes.description: Add admin=true parameter -- some apps check for parameter existence rather than server-side role validation

referer_based.description: Referer-based access control bypass -- remove or change Referer header to bypass checks that use it for authorization

probes.description: Remove Referer header on admin action -- if access control relies on Referer from admin page, removing it may bypass the check

multitenancy.description: Multi-tenancy access control bypass -- access data from other organizations/tenants by manipulating org/tenant identifiers

probes.description: Change org/tenant ID to 1 -- if IDOR exists at the tenant level, full cross-tenant data access is possible

insecure_direct_object.description: IDOR on file/document access -- access other users files by manipulating file IDs or paths

probes.description: Change file/document ID to 1 -- access first uploaded document which likely belongs to admin or another user
